description: This steel rectangular dial watch from maxima with classically minimalist styling and roman numbers is built with precision quartz movement for accuracy, making it as hard-wearing as it is stylish. Case diameter: 28 mm Case thickness: 9 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Ssteele logo and date aperture on the 12-hour mark Steel bracelet with a butterfly clasp Metallic dial with quartz movement Screw to reset time and alarm Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters -wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Comes in an authentic Maxima tin case
